files.notes: This file contains three lesson sections: Lesson I is a full theology lesson about Mary, Lesson II appears to be just a header with no content, and Lesson III contains both genealogy content about Anglo-Saxon surnames and art content about Christmas decorations and architecture. The lessons are clearly delineated with Roman numeral headings.
